section.heading: Construction with other laws
section.chapeau: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed—

paragraph.content: to diminish Federal, State, or tribal jurisdiction, responsibility, or rights in the field of resource enhancement and management, or control of water resources, submerged lands, or navigable waters; nor to limit the authority of Congress to authorize and fund projects; or
as superseding, modifying, or repealing any existing applicable law, except as provided for in this section.
